data.content: Requested changes from implementation review: 1. Retake Now still detects existing running sessions by bare beat ID only, so an active session in another repo with the same beat ID can be incorrectly reused. 2. Rolling-ancestor detection is still not repo-scoped because shippingByBeatId and parentByBeatId are built from merged multi-repo data keyed only by beat ID, so duplicate IDs across repos can still resolve to the wrong ancestor chain. 3. The added tests only assert ordering and presence of logic, not the required repo-scoped behavior, so they miss the regression called out in review. Validation run in review: bunx tsc --noEmit, and bun run test for the retake and rolling-ancestor unit tests.
